hotels.name: Courtyard Charleston Waterfront
concessions: Complimentary shuttle to Waterfront Park in the Historic District
Complimentary gift bag distribution at the front desk (non-personalized)
Complimentary Wi-Fi for Marriott Bonvoy Members
contracting_options: Hotel can offer 10 rooms per night on a courtesy agreement
Courtesy Agreement - NO financial responsibility to client
hotels.cutoff_date: 30 days prior to arrival, by March 17, 2027

hotels.name: The Lindy Renaissance Charleston Hotel
features: On-site restaurant & bar - Lenoir, Handy & Hot
Valet parking $53 per car, per night (subject to change)
concessions: Complimentary gift bag distribution at the front desk (non-personalized)
Complimentary Wi-Fi for Marriott Bonvoy Members
Discounted rates of $459 honored one (1) day before and one (1) day after official block dates
contracting_options: Hotel can offer 10 rooms per night on a courtesy agreement
Courtesy Agreement - NO financial responsibility to client
For 10+ rooms, 90% attrition - Client financially responsible for 90% of the contracted room block
> Cut-off date for this option would be 30 days prior to arrival
$30 nightly destination fee (Destination fee can be waived with a food and beverage purchase)
hotels.cutoff_date: 60 days prior to arrival, by February 15, 2027
